Flagship Product · Pan India Supply

Sodium Sulphate
Filler Masterbatch

Na₂SO₄ · Sodium Sulphate · Imported Fine Powder

We are one of India's largest suppliers of Na₂SO₄ Filler Masterbatch — made from ultra-fine sodium sulphate powder not yet available domestically in India. Our SF SUPER and SF ULTRAFINE brands are specially designed for PE film manufacturers where transparency is critical.

Unlike conventional fillers that cloud films at high loadings, our SF Masterbatch maintains film transparency even at loading ratios up to 70% — delivering exceptional cost reduction without compromising product quality.

  • ✓Maintains transparency even at 70% loading — unique advantage
  • ✓Made from ultra-fine Na₂SO₄ powder — not available in India
  • ✓Imported grade — superior to domestically available alternatives
  • ✓Widely used in PE films, carry bags, packaging films
  • ✓Significant cost reduction per kg of finished product
  • ✓Pan India supply — fast dispatch from Kolkata
🔬 Why SF Masterbatch is Different

The ultra-fine Na₂SO₄ particle size is the key — conventional sodium fillers use coarser powder that scatters light and reduces transparency. Our imported fine powder grade does not. This is why our product is uniquely trusted by PE film producers across India who need both cost efficiency and clarity.

SF SUPER

  • Super high cost performance
  • Super transparency in PE films

Product Line · Pan India

Calcium Filler Masterbatch

We supply a comprehensive range of Calcium Carbonate (CaCO₃) Filler Masterbatch in both PP base and PE base, catering to a wide spectrum of plastic manufacturers across India. Grades available in polymer content from 16% to 24% for precise cost and performance tuning.

Supplied pan India with fast turnaround from our Kolkata base.

GradePolymer %BaseKey Application
CF-1616%PP / PEGeneral filling
CF-1818%PP / PEFilm & moulding
CF-2020%PP / PEWoven & non-woven
CF-2222%PP / PEHeavy-duty bags
CF-2424%PP / PEInjection moulding
PE Base
Polyethylene Applications
  • Tarpaulin / fabrics
  • Carry bags
  • Liner films
  • Packaging films
  • Agricultural films
PP Base
Polypropylene Applications
  • Woven PP bags
  • Non-woven fabric
  • Injection moulded parts
  • Raffia / FIBC bags
  • PP sheet & containers

Custom grades available. Tell us your polymer content, base, and application — we'll supply the right grade pan India.

Imported Premium · Pan India

Black Masterbatch

We supply a premium imported grade Black Masterbatch trusted by carry bag manufacturers across India. Perfect dispersion, deep consistent black, and a 100% success rate in carry bag applications.

Available pan India from our Kolkata base — highly competitive pricing starting at just ₹90/kg + GST.

✓Imported grade — superior to domestic
✓100% success rate in carry bag manufacturing
✓High carbon black loading — deep uniform black
✓No streaks, no unmelts, no fish eyes
✓Compatible with PP, HDPE, LDPE, LLDPE
✓Blown film, injection moulding & extrusion ready
✓Pan India supply from Kolkata

Reprocessed Granules

We manufacture and import all types of reprocessed polymer granules — not just PP. From our own West Bengal recycling plant to direct imports from Japan, USA and across Asia-Pacific, we supply the full spectrum of reprocessed polymer grades to manufacturers across India.

Whether you need PP, PE, HDPE, LDPE or other grades, we stock and source reprocessed granules to match your application and budget.

Specialty Imported · Pan India

Desiccant Masterbatch

Our Desiccant Masterbatch is a premium imported grade product — specifically designed to replace conventional desiccant powder in plastic processing. It absorbs moisture directly within the polymer matrix during processing.

Supplied in special vacuum packaging to maintain full desiccant efficacy from our warehouse to your production floor. Available pan India.

Desiccant Masterbatch vs. Desiccant Powder
Desiccant Powder
Separate dosing required
VS
Our Masterbatch
Integrates in-process
Powder
Dust & handling issues
VS
Masterbatch
Clean, no dust
Powder Storage
Absorbs ambient moisture
VS
Vacuum Pack
Protected until use
Imported Grade · Vacuum Packed · Pan India

Specialty Desiccant Masterbatch

✓Replaces conventional desiccant powder
✓Special vacuum packaging — moisture-protected
✓Eliminates voids, splay marks & surface defects
✓Ideal for recycled & reclaimed plastics
✓Imported grade — superior performance
✓Compatible with PP, PE, HDPE, LDPE
✓No process changes needed

Who We Are

Pan India Polymer
Specialists

Sri Ram Poly Industries Pvt. Ltd. (also known as Sriram Enterprises) is headquartered in Kolkata and supplies polymer raw materials and masterbatch to plastic manufacturers across every state in India. We are not just a regional supplier — we are a pan India company with deep reach into all major plastic manufacturing hubs.

We are one of the largest suppliers of Na₂SO₄ Filler Masterbatch in India under our brands SF SUPER and SF ULTRAFINE. We also manufacture and import all types of reprocessed granules, operate our own recycling plant in West Bengal, and supply imported specialty products including Black Masterbatch and Desiccant Masterbatch.
